name: Sears Holdings Corporation
description: Sears Holdings Corporation was a major American integrated retail company that operated through its subsidiaries, including Sears, Roebuck and Co. and Kmart Corporation. Founded in 2005 through the merger of Sears and Kmart, the company focused on connecting digital and physical shopping experiences across a wide range of merchandise. At its peak, it was one of the largest retailers in the United States. Following years of financial decline and store closures, the company filed for Chapter 11 bankruptcy in 2018 and subsequently underwent significant restructuring and asset liquidation.
